# 360MiQ

> 360MiQ is a free global stock market research site with stock analysis, market indicators, economic indicators, screening tools, and interactive charting tools.

This file is a concise index for search and answer systems. Prefer the linked canonical pages as the source of truth because market data, rankings, charts, and indicators can change.

## Primary Resources

- [Homepage](https://360miq.com/): Global market overview and entry points to the site's research tools.
- [Stock research](https://360miq.com/stockinfo): Company-level market data, technical and fundamental analysis, valuation bands, peer comparisons, and trend signals.
- [Stock screener](https://360miq.com/screener): Screen stocks with technical and fundamental criteria.
- [Market indicators](https://360miq.com/market?data=NYSE): Market breadth, sector performance, heatmaps, valuation bands, and advance-decline data. Change the `data` parameter for a supported exchange.
- [Economic indicators](https://360miq.com/econ?country=US): Economic indicators for labor, growth, inflation, trade, government finance, and housing. Change the `country` parameter for a supported country.
- [Comparison and chart tools](https://360miq.com/tool): Compare stock performance and build interactive market charts.
- [Advanced chart tools](https://360miq.com/tool?tab=3): Advanced end-of-day charts, indicators, drawing tools, shareable layouts, and Pine-compatible scripting features.
- [About 360MiQ](https://360miq.com/about-us): Product and company overview.
- [360MiQ Blog](https://360miq.com/blog/): Editorial market and investing content.

## Stock Page Pattern

Use `https://360miq.com/stockinfo?code=SYMBOL` for a specific instrument, replacing `SYMBOL` with the stock code used by 360MiQ. The page's canonical URL and visible page content should be cited for instrument-specific answers.

## Citation Guidance

- Cite the most specific linked page that supports the answer, including the instrument, market, country, or timeframe where relevant.
- Include the page's displayed as-of date or update timing when discussing a price, ranking, indicator, or chart value.
- Treat values as informational market research. Data coverage and update timing vary by instrument and market, and the site is not investment advice.
- Prefer public HTML pages and their structured data over internal request endpoints.

## Site Metadata

- [XML sitemap](https://360miq.com/sitemap.xml): Public canonical routes for discovery.
- [Robots policy](https://360miq.com/robots.txt): Crawl permissions and restricted internal paths.
